libGDX Behaviour Tree(0,3)
  PsiTreeLineImpl(LINE)(0,2)
    PsiTreeIndentImpl(INDENT)(0,0)
      <empty list>
    PsiTreeGuardImpl(GUARD)(0,1)
      PsiElement(TreeTokenType.()('(')(0,1)
      PsiErrorElement:<task> or TreeTokenType.) expected(1,1)
        <empty list>
    PsiElement(TreeTokenType.end of line)('\n')(1,2)
  PsiTreeLineImpl(LINE)(2,3)
    PsiTreeIndentImpl(INDENT)(2,2)
      <empty list>
    PsiTreeStatementImpl(STATEMENT)(2,3)
      PsiTreeTaskImpl(TASK)(2,3)
        PsiTreeTasknameImpl(TASKNAME)(2,3)
          PsiElement(TreeTokenType.task name)('t')(2,3)
